BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The issue can be exploited remotely because system.debug statements present.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: The presence of debug statements alone can expose sensitive information without requiring complex conditions

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: An attacker generally needs limited access, such as access to logs or a role that can trigger execution paths producing debug output.

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: Sensitive data may be logged automatically during execution without any user interaction

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: Sensitive log data can be exported or shared outside the Salesforce org, crossing security boundaries.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Debug logs can contain credentials, PII, tokens, or business-sensitive data.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: The issue does not directly allow modification of data or logic.

BASE.name: AVAILABILITY
BASE.justification: Leaving debug statements does not affect system availability.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is well known and demonstrable.

TEMPORAL.name: REMEDIATION_LEVEL
TEMPORAL.justification: Debug logging can be mitigated by disabling logs, restricting access,

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The risk of sensitive data exposure through logs is well documented.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_VECTOR
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Logs are typically accessed through Salesforce UI or APIs over the network.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No additional environmental constraints significantly increase exploitation difficulty.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Only limited privileges are usually required to access or receive logs.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The vulnerability manifests automatically during execution.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Sensitive log data can be exported or shared outside the Salesforce org, crossing security boundaries.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Sensitive data leakage remains a serious concern in most environments.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Sensitive data leakage remains a serious concern in most environments.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Salesforce orgs often process sensitive customer and business data.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The issue does not allow modification of data or logic; it only risks exposure of information via logs.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: AVAILABILITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Availability is not a key risk factor for debug logging issues.
